notice: 考生请注意：本套试卷包含单选题、多选题和填空题。考试开始后自动播放听力全文，请认真听并作答。考试时间15分钟，时间到自动交卷。

questions.stem: 第一篇听力答案请填写2-11题，第二篇听力答案请填写12-16题
What is the main topic of the first paragraph?
options: How digital technology helps disabled people, with the example of a smart walking stick.

questions.stem: What specific functions does the smart walking stick for the blind have? (Choose the most complete answer)
options: It can warn of danger, give directions, and provide bus/train schedules.

questions.stem: What was the situation in India according to a 2022 report mentioned in the second paragraph?
options: Over 22% of the population had no internet.
Over 22% of the population couldn't read or write.
New Delhi had too many students.

questions.stem: How did digital technology help solve the problem mentioned in the second paragraph?
options: By sending all students to New Delhi.
By providing rural schools with a powerful internet connection for online lessons.
By training more teachers in villages.

questions.stem: According to the third paragraph, what is one primary ability of firefighting robots?
options: They can put out fires with water.
They can walk, run, climb, and communicate with trapped people.

questions.stem: The smart walking stick can warn its owner of the ______ when an object is detected. (Paragraph 1)
The technology is believed to make the lives of blind people safer and ______. (Paragraph 1)
Digital technology gives students the same chance to learn, no matter where they ______. (Paragraph 2)
While moving, firefighting robots send ______ information to the control unit. (Paragraph 3)
With the video from robots, firefighters can see the fire environment clearly and then make a safe ______. (Paragraph 3)
Zhang Lu and Wu Fei returned to the Wentian ______ module.
Zhang Lu has done 7 spacewalks, a new ______ for China.
The crew's stay in space will be longer by about one ______.
The astronauts do many ______ in space, like life science.
